race.comment: Open race to close out the card. ASK ME MATE (7) loves this course and distance with a win and two seconds from four attempts and will be ready to peak now third run back from the break. This contest looks well within his grasp. UNDERRATED (11) got a well-deserved victory over this track and trip last time out and winning rider Satherley stays on top. Tricky gate to overcome but should be right there at the business end. CERTIFIED COPY (8) resumes here but the form he showed when last in work was good enough for a race of this nature. Can run a race while fresh. KAI MONDO (2) is a five-time winner at this circuit who gets 2kg weight relief with the claim. In the mix. ULUWATU (9) next best from the low draw.
